mapper.select:
SELECT id, s_info_code AS sInfoCode, s_info_name AS sInfoName, b_info_fullname AS bInfoFullname, b_info_issuer AS bInfoIssuer, b_issue_amountplan AS bIssueAmountplan, b_info_carrydate AS bInfoCarrydate, b_info_maturitydate AS bInfoMaturitydate, b_credit_rating AS bCreditRating, issuer_credit_rating AS issuerCreditRating, d_bond_type AS dBondType, b_info_cur_interestrate AS bInfoCurInterestrate, b_info_term_str AS bInfoTermStr FROM sirm_bondinfo
AND s_info_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondCode}, '%')
AND s_info_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondShortName}, '%')
AND b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, s_info_code AS sInfoCode, s_info_name AS sInfoName, b_info_fullname AS bInfoFullname, b_info_issuer AS bInfoIssuer, s_windcode_nib AS sWindcodeNib, s_windcode_sh AS sWindcodeSh, s_windcode_sz AS sWindcodeSz, b_issue_amountplan AS bIssueAmountplan, b_info_cur_interestrate AS bInfoCurInterestrate, b_info_rem_exe_term AS bInfoRemExeTerm, b_info_carrydate AS bInfoCarrydate, b_info_maturitydate AS bInfoMaturitydate, b_info_pledge_ratio AS bInfoPledgeRatio, credit_rating_agency AS creditRatingAgency, b_credit_rating AS bCreditRating, issuer_credit_rating AS issuerCreditRating, rating_outlook AS ratingOutlook, b_info_guarantee_status AS bInfoGuaranteeStatus, b_info_lead_underwriter AS bInfoLeadUnderwriter, inner_issuer_rating AS innerIssuerRating, d_bond_type AS dBondType, b_info_put_exe_term AS bInfoPutExeTerm, b_info_call_rem_term AS bInfoCallRemTerm, inner_guarantor_rating AS innerGuarantorRating, b_info_opt_rem_term AS bInfoOptRemTerm, b_info_term_str AS bInfoTermStr, b_fund_usage AS bFundUsage, b_prompt_reason AS bPromptReason, b_analysis AS bAnalysis FROM sirm_bondinfo WHERE id = #{bondId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_adjust_log (bond_id, bond_code, bond_short_name, bond_type, adjust_type, adjust_mode, target_pool_id, target_pool_name, pool_type, audit_status, adjuster_id, adjuster_name, adjust_reason, adjust_advice, attachment_files, material_files, submit_time, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{bondId}, #{bondCode}, #{bondShortName}, #{bondType}, #{adjustType}, #{adjustMode}, #{targetPoolId}, #{targetPoolName}, #{poolType}, #{auditStatus}, #{adjusterId}, #{adjusterName}, #{adjustReason}, #{adjustAdvice}, #{attachmentFiles}, #{materialFiles}, NOW(), 0, NOW(), NOW())
